knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.editDesc: Name is required; icon accepts any emoji; description can be edited later.
knowledge.confirmDelete: Delete this knowledge base and all of its documents? This cannot be undone.
knowledge.detailEmpty: Select a knowledge base on the left
knowledge.docsHint: Supports .md / .txt / .html files and public web pages. Imported text will be split into chunks; embeddings land in M4-C.
knowledge.importFileDesc: Supports .md / .txt / .html (≤5MB) and .pdf / .docx / .pptx / .xlsx plus images .png/.jpg/.webp/.gif/.bmp/.tiff (≤20MB; images go through OCR, language data is downloaded on first use).
knowledge.importUrlDesc: Fetch the page text (http/https only) and split it using this KB's chunk strategy.
knowledge.fieldDocNamePh: Defaults to the URL's last path segment
knowledge.fileTooLarge: File is too large (>5MB). Split or shorten it first.
knowledge.fileTooLargeBinary: File is too large (>20MB). Split or shorten it first.
knowledge.confirmDeleteDoc: Delete this document and all of its chunks?

localEmbedder.title: Local Embedder Models
localEmbedder.subtitle: Inference via ONNX runtime; first install downloads to disk cache.
localEmbedder.confirmRemove: Delete local model "{model}"? Disk space will be reclaimed.
localEmbedder.notSupported: No local embedder engine with management support is registered in this process. Only Desktop (Electron) and future Web are supported. See docs/p5pro-local-embedder.md §3.

chat.placeholder: Ask anything, or press / for commands
chat.startHint: Send your first message to begin
chat.noModelHint: Open Settings to enable a Provider and a model to start chatting
chat.kbSelectorSubtitle: Selected KBs run topK retrieval on every send; hits are appended to the system prompt
chat.kbSelectorHint: Pick which KBs this conversation retrieves from
chat.docSelectorSubtitle: Vector search runs only inside the selected documents; otherwise the whole selected KB(s) are used
chat.docSelectorHint: Pick documents to scope this send
chat.docSelectorNoKb: Select at least one knowledge base first
chat.docSelectorEmpty: No documents in the selected KB(s) yet
chat.docSelectorEphemeral: Send-time only — not saved on the conversation
chat.mentionNoKb: Select at least one knowledge base before using #
chat.kbSelectorEmpty: No knowledge base yet — create one on the Knowledge page first
chat.hitsEmpty: This reply did not cite any knowledge base

prompt.title: Prompt Library
prompt.editDesc: Title and content are required; description is optional; category is for organization.
prompt.confirmDelete: Delete this prompt? This cannot be undone.
prompt.detailEmpty: Select a prompt on the left
prompt.fieldContentPh: Enter prompt content, you can use {variable} placeholders…

appearance.themeDesc: Follow system, force light, or force dark
appearance.accentDesc: Primary color used for buttons, focus rings, success states
appearance.navBarDesc: Place the primary nav on the left (icon sidebar) or on top (horizontal bar)
appearance.densityDesc: Comfortable or compact (affects row height & spacing)

data.exportDesc: Export all conversations and messages to a local JSON file
data.dangerDesc: Clearing conversations or resetting cannot be undone

shortcuts.cheatDesc: Read-only: keys fixed inside the chat window
shortcuts.recordHint: Focus the box below and press your combination
shortcuts.conflictWith: This combo is taken by another action

developer.title: Developer
developer.databaseDesc: SQLite file path and table counts

providers.title: Model Providers
providers.emptyHint: No providers yet. Click "+ Add" below to start
providers.detailEmpty: Select or create a Provider on the left
providers.noModelHint: No models yet. Click the right button to add or pull
providers.displayNamePh: Defaults to Model ID if empty
providers.capabilitiesDesc: Select specific capabilities available for this model
providers.hintConfigApiKey: Please click the edit icon on top right to fill in the API Key first.
providers.hintEnableDesc: Please enable it on top right or in the left list, otherwise its models will not be visible in the chat pane.
providers.hintNoModelsDesc: Click "Get Models" on top right to pull from API automatically, or click "Add" to manually enter.

dialog.title: New Provider
dialog.urlPh: Base URL of the API, leave blank for default
dialog.probeError: Failed to pull models. Please check Base URL and API Key
dialog.step2Desc: Select models to add, or enter Model ID manually below; click finish to save all at once
dialog.manualPh: Enter Model ID manually (e.g., gpt-4o-mini / qwen2.5:7b)
dialog.step1Desc: Fill in connection info, next step will pull model list from Provider
dialog.localEmbedderHint:
Local Embedder works via Desktop ONNX runtime, **NO** Base URL or API Key needed.
Click ⚡ on top right to test, and scroll down to install recommended models (bge-small / bge-base / bge-m3). See docs/p5pro-local-embedder.md.

translate.title: Translate
translate.apiError: Translation failed. Check network or API configuration.
translate.temperatureHint: Lower = more precise, higher = more creative
translate.systemPromptPh: Leave blank to use default prompt…

image.title: Image Generation
image.negativePh: Things you don't want in the image…
image.promptPh: Describe the image you want to generate, be as detailed as possible…
image.footerHint: Steps / Seed / Guidance are for SD / Flux compatible models. With DALL·E they are only stored.
image.emptyDesc: Enter a description above and click generate to create your first AI image
image.tipDetail: More detailed prompts yield better results
image.tipDetail2: Style, colors, composition and other details

aiRename.title: AI Smart Rename
aiRename.desc: Automatically generate a meaningful title from conversation content after the first AI reply. Turn off when not needed.
aiRename.enableDesc: New conversations get auto-titled on first AI reply. Existing conversations are unaffected.
aiRename.modelDesc: Use a lightweight model for the rename task (DeepSeek or OpenAI-compatible recommended).
aiRename.noModel: No models available. Please configure a Provider and enable models first.

agent.title: Agent Mode
agent.description: Enter a goal and Agent will think, call tools, and complete the task automatically
agent.goalPlaceholder: Describe your goal, Agent will use tools to complete the task...
agent.confirmMessage: Agent is attempting to call {toolName}. This may modify files or execute commands. Allow?
agent.confirmAutoApprove: Subsequent calls to the same tool in this run will be auto-approved
agent.emptyDesc: Enter a goal and Agent will think, call tools, and complete the task automatically
agent.noToolModel: No tool-calling models available. Configure a Provider with tools-capable models in settings.

home.title: Welcome to XiabaoAI
home.subtitle: Choose a feature from the left sidebar to get started

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Manage Model Context Protocol server connections and tool authorizations
mcp.emptyDesc: Add an MCP server to extend AI's tool capabilities

toolSettings.title: Registered Tools
toolSettings.desc: The model can call the following tools when generating responses. Results are appended as messages to the conversation.
toolSettings.webSearchDesc: Configure Tavily API Key to enable real-time information retrieval

emptyState.orSelect: Select an example or start typing below

chatMain.noModelHint: Providers configured but no models listed? Go to Settings > Providers, click the button on provider cards to pull the model list remotely.
chatMain.localEmbedderNote: Note: local-embedder is only for knowledge base vectorization, it won't appear in the chat model selector.
chatMain.firstMsgHint: Send the first message to start a conversation

onboarding.title: Welcome to XiabaoAI
onboarding.step1_subtitle: A single app to access all AI models
onboarding.step1_feature1: All data stored locally in SQLite
onboarding.step1_feature3: Your API keys stay on your machine
onboarding.step3_subtitle: Enter your API key to connect
onboarding.step4_subtitle: Pick a theme and accent color
onboarding.step4_previewHello: Hello! This is a preview message.
onboarding.step5_hint: You can change these settings anytime via the Settings icon in the bottom left.
